  "notes": "Source salary table is Exhibit F.4 (page F-4). Counts table Exhibit F.3 (page F-3) transcribed as weights table (index 1) for the <25 target row which merges 'Under 20' and '20-24' age bins. Suppressed cells marked '*' (fewer than four members). Empty cells are null. Total row and Total column excluded. The source service bins top out at 'Over 30' which is coarser than target's separate '34' and '40' buckets; since averages do not split, 'Over 30' is copied into both target columns 34 and 40. All other age and service bins map directly."
